name: Baby items
description:
A family of five has recently welcomed a baby boy, but the father's income has dropped significantly while on paternity leave as he cannot work overtime. As the sole breadwinner, this reduction in income is straining their budget just when newborn expenses are highest. We're seeking donors to sponsor 3 months of diapers, wet wipes and milk powder to help this family through this transitional period.

Diapers: Drypers SuperDry Premium Tape Baby Diaper S size - 66 pc x 5 https://sg.shp.ee/M4eZDGYY

Wet Wipes: BELLO Baby Wipes no caps - 10 packs x 5 https://sg.shp.ee/Jpk4MZc8

Milk Powder: GROW Infant Milk Formula for Babies Stage 1 (0-12 months) 900g – 6 tins https://sg.shp.ee/Swda2HGg

passiton.name: Various baby items to bless
passiton.description:
Items to bless: 
1. 3 pairs of brand new nursing bras (L size) 
2. 1 foldable baby mat 
3. 1 bathing net to attach to bathtub
4. toys and book for baby
5. 1 breastfeeding book and nursing cover 
6. opened pack of diapers M size (brand moko moko) 
7. 2 x waterproof mats (used once only) 
8. 1x  medela breast pump and power charger only.
9. 1 x feeding bib 
10. Breast milk storage bags 
11. Jevon baby brand disposable Breast pads x 1 pack

name: Diapers
description: Client lives in a 4-room HDB flat with her elderly parents, husband and their four young children, aged 11, 6, 5, and 1. The family is currently facing financial challenges due to bankruptcy and the monthly household income is insufficient to meet the family's basic needs. Family is seeking support for essential items such as Drypers Superdry Pants XL and Drypers Superdry Pants XXL for their young children. For further liaison, kindly WhatsApp me at 98598768, I will respond from 9am to 5pm on weekdays. Thank you very much!

name: Diapers
description: Single mother with 3 children ranging from 8 months to 15 y/o requires assistance to purchase diapers as she is tight on finances. She is also undergoing divorce and is not receiving money from her spouse. The assistance with purchasing diapers for her will be beneficial to tide through the financial constraints.

name: Diapers
description: Mother is currently unemployed and have no income, while husband have an unstable job as a grab driver. They have 3 young children (6y/o, 3 y/o, and 1 y/o) and faces financial difficulties. Mother is also diagnosed with mental health issues (anxiety & depression) which adds on to caregiver stress. The family is in urgent need of diapers (Merries Pants Diaper - L (9 - 14kg and Merries Tape Diapers - M (6 - 11kg) for her 3 y/o child and 1 y/o child.

name: Diapers
description:
Family of eight in a 3-room purchased flat. Mother is a full-time caregiver for her child with special needs. Father works contract transport jobs as the sole-bread winner. Family is financially strained with existing debs. Father has multiple health conditions as well which impacts his income-earning abilities on occasion. 
Support with essential child-related items will be helpful for them.

name: Diaper
description: Family has 8 school-going children requires diapers (XL, tape) for their youngest child. Mom is a home maker, and father works part-time due to his health condition.

name: 3 seater sofa
description: Family of 5 with 2 school-going children living in a 2-room rental flat who requires a 3-seater sofa as their current one is broken. Father is the sole breadwinner. Would greatly appreciate if donor is able to cover transport expenses.

contact.org: MSF Social Service Office @ Kreta Ayer
contact.name: Mohamad Harith

passiton.name: IKEA GRONLID sofa - 3 seater
passiton.description:

name: Dining table
description: Client who is transiting to Long-home-leave after a 1 year residential stay at HCSA Highpoint. He needs a small dining table as he is staying in an L-shape rental flat. Table will be placed against the wall.

passiton.name: Wooden Dining table
passiton.description: Chairs not included. Comes with glass top.
passiton.location: Bayshore, Bedok, Chai Chee, Eastwood, Kew Drive, Upper East Coast

name: Bed with mattress
description:
Client is a single mother moving to a new rental flat with her 3 young children. Client is unemployed as she needs to provide care to her infant child.

The family requires a bed with mattress, ideally with in-build storage spaces. The bed can be either a double decker bed or king/queen-size bed.

contact.org: Fei Yue Family Service Centre @ Champions Way
contact.name: Eileen Yong

passiton.name: Loft bed with mattress
passiton.description: White wooden loft bed with mattress
passiton.location: Chancery , Dunearn Road, Moulmein, Newton, Novena, Thomson, Watten Estate

passiton.name: Super single bed with mattress
passiton.description: Super single bed with mattress. Bed railing can be included together with pillow, bolster and bedsheet

name: Queen Size Bed
description: Family consists of two children, aged 11 months and 3 years old respectively. Client is the main financial provider and caregiver for these two grandchildren of hers. However, client has been struggling to get diapers and milk powder for her 3 year old grandson and grandaughter recently as she has faced with loss of income due to her health concerns (cataract). Client is also looking for a double bed for children and grandchildren.

contact.org: Allkin Family Service Centre @ Cheng San 445
contact.name: Frank Lye Wei Bin

passiton.name: Queen size wooden bed frame with matttess
passiton.description: Switching to two single beds. Giving up a queen sized wooden bed frame which is sturdy and functional. Mattress optional if there is concern about hygiene issues.
passiton.location: Bukit Batok , Bukit Panjang, Choa Chu Kang, Dairy Farm, Hillview

name: Smart TV
description: Family of 4 school-going children requires a Smart TV to provide another form of edutainment for their children. They have not been able to afford a TV for more than 10 years after their TV broke down. Both parents are not able to sustain gainful employment currently due to their health conditions.

contact.org: MSF Social Service Office @ Woodlands, Sembawang

name: TV
description:
Client is a diabetic patient who also experiences ongoing gastrointestinal issues. She suffers from frequent diarrhoea and urinary urgency, which has resulted in her needing to use diapers daily. The client often feels physically weak, making it difficult for her to secure stable employment.
She is known to SSO and currently receives financial assistance. While she has adequate informal support, the client prefers not to trouble her support network and will only seek help when she has insufficient funds. She stays alone in a rental flat.

contact.name: Frank Lye Wei Bin

name: Diapers
description: Client is a senior elderly who sustained a fall at the start of 2025 and has been wearing diapers as she requires wheelchair assistance for the time being as she recovers from physiotherapy. Client's family has limited financial support and these diapers are a regular purchase that causes further financial strain. Client has kindly requested the following brand for comfort: Tena  Proskin Pants L size.

name: Diapers
description: Urgent request for diapers for two siblings who are diagnosed with autism and attending SPED school. Both children have toileting issues and require daily diapers. Father was the sole breadwinner while mother looks after the children. However, father was recently retrenched and the family requires urgent financial support, particularly the children's daily diaper needs. older boy (aged 10) wears Fairprice adult diaper pants, size L. younger boy (aged 8) wears Fairprice baby dry pants diapers size XXL. Seeking urgent diapers sponsors for the children while their financial assistance application outcome is pending.

name: Bicycle
